post.subject: I have money!!
post.body: There is money in my bank!! Its 9am. I didnt sleep last night. I watched GMTV from 6 this morning, some cartoons, Everybody Loves Raymond ('cos that show is great) and some other stuff. Dad'll be here at about 12. Im gonna get him a Birthday present in town... I have no idea what to get. He doesnt like anything... I saw clips from Charlie and the Chocolate Factory this morning. Looks fuckin awesome!
